calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2019 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-23-2018 Continued To Apr-08-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Terminate Stay Of Proceedings
Off Calendar Jun-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Arthur Harris,Esq. 415-788-1900 of Murphy Pearson Bradley & Feeney for Defendant MICHAEL ROONEY.
No other Appearance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL ROONEY's Motion To Terminate Stay Of Proceedings.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling. The motion is Granted as Unopposed. Defendant to prepare a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling lifting the stay. The clerk to inform Dept. 206 and Dept. 610 re: stay once an order is signed.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2017 Set For Trial On Jul-16-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2017 Set For Trial On Feb-26-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

OBJECTION HEARING CALENDAR
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Off Calendar
